title: Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika 5
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|title=''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' 5}} {{ComicBook |image=[[File:Underworld-TheYavinVassilika5.jpg]] |title=''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' 5 |writer=[[Mike Kennedy]] |penciller=[[Carlos Meglia]] |inker=Carlos Meglia |letterer=[[Steve Dutro]] |colorist=[[Helen Bach]] |cover artist=Carlos Meglia |editor=[[David Land|Dave Land]] |publisher=[[Dark Horse Comics]] |release date=[[June 20]], [[2001]]{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/00-298/Star-Wars-Underworld-5-of-5|text=Star Wars: Underworld 5}} |pages=32 |upc= |timeline=[[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]]The date of this story is established internally in relation to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], which ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]]. |series=''[[Star Wars: Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika]]'' |issue=5 |next=last }} '''''Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika'' 5''' was the fifth and final issue in the ''[[Star Wars: Underworld: The Yavin Vassilika]]'' series of comics. It was released [[June 20]], [[2001]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''Never trust a scoundrel, especially one that's smiling. As the race for the fabled Vassilika culminates in a seven-way free-for-all and a mad-dash for freedom, it's every being for himself and partners be damned! But as Han, Lando, and the rest of the competitors soon learn, the most dangerous enemy is the one you can't see...Wrapping up the exciting ''Underworld'' series and featuring a painted cover by Carlos Meglia!'' ==Plot summary== {{Plot|comic}} ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:Underworld-TheYavinVassilika5.jpg|Cover File:UnderworldTYV5-FC.png|Cover art File:Underworld5_PC.jpg|Photo variant cover File:UnderworldTYV5-PhotoVariantCover.png|Unlettered photo variant ===Collected in===
